name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive】M11393 Black, Apricot, White. This Babylone Tote handbag traces its roots to the Babylone trend community in Paris, using fine calfskin to outline clean lines and ample space for your travel essentials. It features a central zip pocket and adjustable handles for different shoulder lengths. 31 x 21.5 x 13 cm (Length x Height x Width)
